description: Customer self-ordering system supporting kiosk terminals and mobile QR-code ordering, with menu browsing, cart management, payment processing, and real-time order status updates.

actors.name: Customer
actors.description: Browses menu, places order, and pays via kiosk or mobile device

actors.name: POS Operator
actors.description: Manages configuration, monitors orders, marks items ready

actors.name: Order System
actors.description: Validates orders, processes payments, sends notifications

values.name: cart_review
values.description: Customer is reviewing items in cart

values.name: payment_pending
values.description: Customer has submitted order and payment is being processed

values.name: confirmed
values.description: Order confirmed and sent to kitchen

values.name: ready
values.description: Order is ready for pickup or delivery to table

values.name: cancelled
values.description: Customer cancelled the order before payment

transitions.description: Customer adds first item to cart
Customer continues browsing to add more items

transitions.condition: Order must still be in draft (unpaid) state

kiosk_no_cash.description: Kiosk mode only allows card and digital payment methods — no cash

mobile_table_requires_identifier.description: Mobile ordering with table service requires a valid table identifier from QR code

pay_each_for_counter.description: Counter service mode forces immediate payment per order

pay_meal_requires_table.description: Pay-after-meal option only available with table service mode

category_operating_hours.description: Product categories can have operating hour restrictions (e.g., lunch menu 11:00-14:00). Products outside their category's hours are hidden.

overnight_hours_support.description: Operating hours where start > end (e.g., 22:00-02:00) are treated as overnight and span across midnight.

product_must_be_self_order_enabled.description: Only products explicitly marked as available for self-ordering are shown

server_side_price_recomputation.description: All prices are recomputed server-side on order submission — frontend prices are display-only and cannot be manipulated.

active_session_required.description: Self-ordering is only available when a POS session is active

constant_time_token_check.description: Access tokens are compared using constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks

kiosk_inactivity_timeout.description: Kiosk resets to landing page after 30 seconds of inactivity on confirmation screen

given: customer scans table QR code containing table identifier and access token
customer selects products from the available menu

then.description: Order created in draft state linked to the table
POS operator notified of new order

mobile_order_placed.result: Order appears on POS terminal and is sent to kitchen

given: customer uses kiosk terminal to select products
customer initiates payment via card or digital method
kiosk_order_with_payment.result: Order confirmed, receipt printed, kiosk resets after timeout

given: one or more items become unavailable (out of stock or outside operating hours)
item_unavailable_during_browse.result: Customer sees which items were removed and can adjust their order

given: customer decides to cancel before payment
order is still in draft state
order_cancelled_by_customer.result: Order removed, customer returns to landing page

given: POS operator closes the session while customers are ordering
session_closed_during_ordering.result: Customer cannot submit orders until a new session opens

given: request contains an invalid or expired access token
invalid_access_token.result: Request rejected, no order data exposed

then.description: Payment error shown with retry option

payment_failed.result: Customer can retry payment or cancel the order

errors.message: We're currently closed. Please try again later.
Unauthorized access. Please scan the QR code again.
Payment could not be processed. Please try again or use a different method.
Table not found. Please scan the QR code at your table.
Your order does not exist or has been removed.
One or more selected products are no longer available.

events.name: self_order.order.submitted
events.description: Customer submitted an order from mobile or kiosk

events.name: self_order.payment.completed
events.description: Payment successfully processed for a self-order

events.name: self_order.order.ready
events.description: Kitchen marks the order as ready for pickup/delivery

events.name: self_order.product.unavailable
events.description: A product became unavailable while customers are browsing

events.name: self_order.session.status_changed
events.description: POS session status changed (opened/closed) affecting self-ordering availability

related.reason: Self-orders create POS orders within an active session
Customers can apply loyalty rewards during self-ordering
